allow: Bash(python -c "import realtime, inspect; print\('realtime', getattr\(realtime,'__version__','?'\)\); from realtime import AsyncRealtimeChannel as C; print\(sorted\(m for m in dir\(C\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)\)\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $p = $c | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Stopped PID $p on port 3000" } else { "nothing on 3000" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "3000 still busy" } else { "port 3000 FREE" }; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "note: port 3001 also has a server running \(your WSL one\)" })
